category_sources: source_facts.description says it manipulates IPv6 addresses; source_facts.homepage is the official deepspace6 ipv6calc project page.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ipv6calc; official homepage URL path and GitHub repository name use ipv6calc.
docs_sources: Official project homepage is source_facts.homepage; official source repository README is an additional official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pbiering/ipv6calc, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says IPv6 address manipulation; source_facts.executables include ipv6calc, ipv6loganon, ipv6logconv, and ipv6logstats.
